problem: The repository did not have a unified responsive booking-route contract spanning breakpoint class, mission-stack state, embedded host mode, safe-area posture, and sticky action posture.
closure: Task 302 adds BookingResponsiveCoverageProfile in patient-web and publishes the route-level DOM markers required for Playwright proof.
remainingRisk: The responsive coverage profile is still a frontend-local contract and is not yet shared with other app shells.
